title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 524.070 - Pleadings and proceedings
text:
524.070.  Pleadings and proceedings. — All pleadings and proceedings in this action shall be conducted as in other civil actions, except where it is herein otherwise prescribed.
(RSMo 1939 § 1535) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1371; 1919 § 1821; 1909 § 2388
